name: Ontario 511 Transportation API
description: REST API providing access to Ontario 511 transportation data including traffic events, construction, cameras, road conditions, transit hubs, carpool lots, ferries, service centres, travel info centres, HOT/HOV lanes, truck rest areas, inspection stations, roundabouts, seasonal loads, rest areas, and alerts. Rate limited to 10 calls per 60 seconds.
